Dedicated to the wellness of seniors, Concordia Village is designed for seniors seeking independent living with the convenience of on-site support services.

Join Our Team

Concordia Wellness Projects offers a rewarding career in a variety of exciting disciplines, with full and part-time positions available.

We are proud of our team, who embody our Values on a daily basis.

We are a community who cares for our residents as much as we do for each other. Download and complete our application form and submit it along with your resume to hr@concordiavillage.ca.

Employment Application Form (PDF)

All Departments
hr@concordiavillage.ca

*A Criminal Record Check (CRC), Adult Abuse, and Child Abuse Registry checks are a requisite of employment at Concordia Village. We thank all applicants for their interest, however, please note that only those selected for an interview will be contacted.
